name: George Müller
title: Evangelist & Orphanage Director
bio: Prussian-born evangelist and director of the Ashley Down orphanage in Bristol, England. He cared for over 10,000 orphans during his lifetime and established 117 schools offering Christian education to over 120,000 children.
faith: Müller is renowned for his radical faith in God's provision. He never asked for money or went into debt, instead relying entirely on prayer. He recorded over 50,000 specific answers to prayer in his journals. He also distributed over 2 million Bibles and tracts.

sources.title: George Müller — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the man of faith who cared for 10,000 orphans

sources.title: The Autobiography of George Müller
sources.note: Müller's own account of his life of faith and answered prayer

sources.title: George Müller: Delighted in God
sources.note: Documentaries about Müller's extraordinary prayer life

tagline: Fed 10,000 orphans by prayer alone, never asking anyone but God
